prose:
The frontier orbitals calculation on ethylene using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase has been completed. The SCF converged successfully after 6 cycles.

The HOMO energy is approximately -7.61558 eV, and the LUMO energy is approximately -0.17987 eV. The HOMO-LUMO gap is about 7.43572 eV. The orbitals are listed with their energies and occupations.

I used the chemkit tool with the following method: B3LYP/def2-TZVP, in PySCF, with the specified geometry in gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1.
